UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Integral Senior Living Management is present, represented by Peter Nixdorf.
Attorney Dana Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant James Mooney is present.
Attorney Ryan Orkisz appearing for defendant.

Settlement discussions held with a Judge Pro Tem Dawn Payne. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of Jul-07-2025 is vacated.
